div.p: Aplikasi pencatatan tabungan dan arisan qurban keluarga secara real-time dan terintegrasi cloud.

div.class: flex flex-col h-screen overflow-hidden text-sm
fixed inset-0 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-[99999] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white transition-opacity duration-300
relative flex items-center justify-center mb-4
w-16 h-16 border-4 border-emerald-500/20 border-t-emerald-500 rounded-full animate-spin
fixed top-5 right-5 z-[99999] flex flex-col gap-2 pointer-events-none
fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xs z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center hidden
bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 max-w-sm w-full mx-4 shadow-xl border border-slate-100 transform scale-95 transition-all
w-12 h-12 bg-amber-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-amber-500 mb-4 mx-auto

div.p: Apakah Anda yakin ingin melakukan tindakan ini?

div.class: flex gap-3

button.class: flex-1 py-2.5 bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 text-xs font-semibold rounded-xl transition

p.class: text-xs text-emerald-200 font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest mt-1

p-8 pt-4

div.class: mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-slate-100 text-center
div.p: Jika belum terdaftar atau lupa PIN, silakan hubungi Pengurus Arisan untuk pendaftaran data akun Anda.

div.class: fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xs z-30 hidden md:hidden
hidden h-screen overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row w-full relative bg-slate-50

aside.class: fixed md:static inset-y-0 left-0 w-64 bg-emerald-950 text-white flex flex-col shrink-0 shadow-xl z-40 transition-transform duration-300 -translate-x-full md:translate-x-0 no-print overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar

div.class: p-6 border-b border-emerald-900/60 flex items-center justify-between shrink-0
flex items-center gap-3
bg-emerald-800 p-2.5 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-amber-300 shadow-md

button.class: md:hidden text-emerald-300 hover:text-white p-1 rounded-lg hover:bg-emerald-900/50
flex items-center gap-3.5 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-xs font-semibold transition bg-emerald-800 text-white w-full
flex items-center gap-3.5 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-xs font-semibold transition text-emerald-100 hover:bg-emerald-900/50 w-full admin-only

button.class: text-emerald-300 hover:text-white transition
button.title: Sinkronisasi Ulang

div.class: flex items-center gap-2 bg-emerald-900/30 p-2 rounded-xl border border-emerald-800/40
mt-2 text-[9px] text-emerald-500/80 font-mono truncate

main.class: flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar relative

header.class: sticky top-0 z-30 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xs border-b border-slate-200/80 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between no-print shadow-xs shrink-0

button.class: md:hidden text-slate-700 hover:text-slate-900 p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-100

div.class: flex items-center gap-4
text-right hidden sm:block

lg:col-span-2 bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/80 shadow-xs space-y-4

div.class: flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 w-full sm:w-auto
relative flex-1 min-w-[200px] sm:max-w-xs

span.class: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 flex items-center pl-3 text-slate-400

input.class: w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2 text-xs rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/10 focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition text-slate-700 bg-white shadow-xs

button.class: bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white text-xs font-semibold px-3 py-2 rounded-xl transition flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-md shadow-emerald-500/10

div.class: overflow-x-auto custom-scrollbar -mx-6 sm:mx-0

tr.class: text-slate-400 font-bold border-b border-slate-100 text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider bg-slate-50/50

div.class: mt-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-3 border-t border-slate-100 pt-4
flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-500

select.class: px-3 py-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/10

div.class: flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center gap-3
flex items-center gap-1.5
bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/80 shadow-xs flex flex-col
flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-5 shrink-0

h3.class: text-sm font-bold text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2

div.p: Visualisasi progres kepatuhan setoran tabungan shohibul per bulan pertemuan.

div.class: flex items-center gap-2

button.class: px-3 py-2 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white text-xs font-semibold rounded-xl flex items-center gap-1.5 transition shadow-md shadow-emerald-500/10
px-3 py-2 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 text-slate-600 text-xs font-semibold rounded-xl flex items-center gap-1.5 transition bg-white

div.class: overflow-x-auto custom-scrollbar -mx-6 sm:mx-0 border border-slate-100 rounded-xl
bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/80 shadow-xs max-w-2xl

h3.class: text-sm font-bold text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2 mb-4

div.class: bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200/60 rounded-xl p-4 text-xs text-amber-800 leading-relaxed space-y-2 mb-6
div.p: Saat variabel IS_PREVIEW diset ke true, aplikasi berjalan dalam Mode Simulasi (menggunakan data mockup lokal). Data yang diinput hanya tersimpan sementara di memori browser Anda.

Untuk mengaktifkan sinkronisasi nyata antar perangkat (Mobile & Desktop), Anda harus mendistribusikan data melalui cloud. Caranya: set IS_PREVIEW = false pada kode template, lalu tempelkan URL Web App hasil deploy Google Apps Script Anda pada kolom di bawah.

label.class: block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5

div.class: flex items-center gap-2

label.class: block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5

form.label: Web App GAS URL

div.class: flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2

input.class: w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/10 focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none bg-white text-slate-700 font-mono text-xs

button.class: px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-emerald-600 text-white text-xs font-extrabold hover:bg-emerald-700 transition shrink-0

form.p: Tempel URL Web App Google Apps Script berakhiran /exec. Untuk perangkat baru yang belum pernah membuka aplikasi, URL ini juga harus ada di HTML Blogger sebagai URL bootstrap/default.

form.class: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4 border-t border-slate-100 pt-4

label.class: block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5

input.class: w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/10 focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none bg-white text-slate-700 text-xs

label.class: block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5

input.class: w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/10 focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none bg-white text-slate-700 text-xs

label.class: block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5

div.class: flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2

input.class: w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/10 focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none bg-white text-slate-700 text-xs

button.class: px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-slate-900 text-white text-xs font-extrabold hover:bg-slate-800 transition shrink-0
